name: Community Icons
description: Adds a search menu to the Icon Kit to browse community icons.

firebase-project-id.name: Firebase Project ID
firebase-project-id.description: The Firebase project ID used to fetch icon packs from Firestore (e.g. my-project-12345). Find this in the Firebase Console under Project Settings.

firebase-api-key.name: Firebase Web API Key
firebase-api-key.description: The Firebase Web API Key for write operations (accept/decline submissions). Find this in the Firebase Console under Project Settings > General > Web API Key.

discord-url.name: Discord Invite URL
discord-url.description: The Discord invite link opened when clicking the 'Join the Discord' button in the icon pack browser.
